steps.t: Fresh water may be obtained in the small cave within the Shadowed Refuge. The Globsnaga Orcs' stagnant spring may be found at Dalgum-ru, south of the …
The Globsnaga Orcs' stagnant spring is at Dalgum-ru, south of the Shadowed Refuge. Bring the water-skin of fresh water to the Orcs' water supply.
Tyki is at the Shadowed Refuge, north of Dalgum-ru. You should return to Tyki and report back with the results of his freshwater cure.
